parsed.production_notes: The video consists of a single, static AI-generated illustration where only the mouth and eyes are animated. The art style is a typical AI anime/illustration aesthetic with no natural body movement.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a fair complexion, short wavy dark brown hair, and brown eyes. Rendered in an anime/illustration style.
characters.wardrobe: Chunky cream-colored turtleneck sweater and small gold hoop earrings.

scenes.setting: Inside a cozy cafe or room, looking out a window at a rainy city street at night. Warm indoor lighting contrasting with cool outdoor rain.

panels.panel_visual_description: An anime-style illustration of Character A standing indoors by a window. She is looking directly forward with a slight smile. Behind her is a windowpane covered in raindrops. Outside the window, a blurry city street is visible with glowing neon signs in red and green. On the windowsill to her left and right are small potted green plants and a stack of books. The lighting is warm and cozy on the character, contrasting with the rainy, darker scene outside.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a single, continuous shot of an AI-generated anime-style woman talking. She is positioned in the center of the frame, indoors by a window. The background shows a rainy city street with neon lights. Pink text bubbles appear in the center of the screen, displaying her speech. The character's body remains completely still, with only her mouth and eyes animated to match the audio.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I don't need perfect English
Character A says: I just want to speak with confidence
Character A says: But for years
Character A says: I felt nervous and scared of making mistakes
Character A says: every time I opened my mouth
Character A says: I understood everything
Character A says: Netflix, podcasts, songs, no problem
Character A says: But my brain got lazy
Character A says: because I was training my eyes with subtitles, not my mouth
Character A says: It's called the 'Crutch Effect'
Character A says: and it's why your English stays stuck
Character A says: Then I found Fluently
Character A says: It uses the APA cycle: Absorb, Practice, and Adjust
Character A says: It's how we naturally learn to talk
Character A says: no books, no pressure, just real speaking immersion
Character A says: Stop training your eyes and start training your mouth
Character A says: Download Fluently and finally start speaking with confidence

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark purple gradient background. There are no characters, props, or physical elements present. The scene serves entirely as a blank canvas.
